summary: All 10 sections verified, Integrator complete, edge-case-testing executed with test-report.json (24 pass, 0 fail, 11 deferred-to-CV-Playwright). 5 inline-deviations logged (dev-001 through dev-005); 1 Sev 0 record as audit companion to dev-001 (dual-path engine). No escalations routed. Awaiting Orchestrator's final-verification dispatch (Critic final-sweep → CV → delivery to output/final/ → run-report). Critical caveat for Orchestrator to surface: client-dealer mode is the default and is not collusion-secure; production-grade Cloud Functions source ships under output/integration/functions/ ready to deploy.

inline_deviations.summary: Dual-path engine: client-dealer fallback default + Cloud Functions ready-to-deploy. Always-deliver contract preserved without requiring user to deploy functions.
Client RNG = window.crypto.getRandomValues; Cloud Function RNG = Node crypto.randomBytes.
Auto-start-after-5min: Cloud Function scheduled task + client-side setTimeout mirror.
edge-case-testing splits into pure-function node-harness (executed) + DOM/browser (deferred to CV Playwright).

critical_caveats_for_orchestrator: Client-dealer mode (default SERVER_ENGINE_MODE='client-dealer' in src/config.js) is NOT cryptographically secure against collusion — a malicious dealer client could read others' hole cards. README Caveats + DEPLOYMENT.md tradeoff table document this. Production-grade Cloud Functions source ships at output/integration/functions/ ready to deploy with `firebase deploy --only functions --project gto-poker-qui`; then flip SERVER_ENGINE_MODE to 'cloud-functions'.

Three first-time-setup steps required by project owner before live build behaves correctly: (1) set ADMIN_UID in src/config.js to your Google uid; (2) update REPLACE_WITH_PROJECT_OWNER_GOOGLE_UID literal in firestore.rules and publish; (3) add mondrianaire.github.io to Firebase Auth's authorized domains. README + DEPLOYMENT.md document all three.

Disconnect/auto-fold (DCA.A26) is structurally present but not fully exercised in test-report.json — flagged as deferred_to_cv_playwright. CV's Tier-3 artifact exercise should confirm during its Playwright pass.
